DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-13-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT 1453 GRANT LLC DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT

is OVERRULED, 20 days to answer. First Amended Complaint sufficiently states cause of action for Intentional Infliction of Emotional Distress and cause of action for nuisance is not duplicative of cause of action for negligence as it seeks different damages, while arising out of the same set of facts. Plaintiff's Declaration in support of opposition is stricken.

Prevailing Party to submit proposed order that is in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b)
